known_limits: Contribution comparison only runs for matching trace ids.
Only changed score events are compared; false predicate paths are not traced yet.
Candidate matching currently uses move slot plus rule id.

known_gaps: ROM/Python contribution traces are compared only for matching trace ids.
Public-read provenance is explicit branch/probe snapshot coverage, not CPU memory-read slicing.
Scenario policy mismatches are debugger expectation checks, not ROM materialized-state replays.

known_limits: Trace events are captured by PyBoy execution hooks, not by an in-ROM WRAM ring buffer.
Score events record score helper deltas and source labels, while rule entries record dynamic rule-label execution.
Predicate branch entries record selected executable public-info branch labels and configured outcomes.
Public-read probe entries record legal-input snapshots at configured executable labels; they are not CPU memory-read watchpoints.
